abilities.description: A lookout in your crow's nest scans the horizons to help spot dangers. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition} (+wits), you may reroll one challenge die.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.13b2d777c6fb719d]{Gather Information} by scanning your ship's surroundings or studying the coastline, instead of rolling the action die, make it the value of your ship's integrity. Take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} against an ambush, or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger} to detect a hidden threat, you may roll +integrity. If you do, reroll any dice and take +1 momentum on a hit.
